output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? How to Get It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your deposit? Get your money back fast with a legal demand letter for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no signup needed.
content_outline: The Silent Treatment: Why Landlords Withhold Security Deposits
Tenant Rights 101: What Your Landlord Can and Cannot Deduct
From Frustration to Action: Writing a Security Deposit Dispute Letter
The 60-Second Solution: Demand Your Deposit Back Without a Lawyer
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 30 days
Landlords cannot legally deduct for normal wear and tear or vague cleaning fees
A formal letter of demand is often enough to force compliance before small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99 with no subscription
output.cta: Stop begging your landlord. Get your money back in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99. No signup. No subscription. Send your demand letter now.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters who are dealing with landlords withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposits

social_hooks.hook: Your landlord is withholding your security deposit. This $19 letter gets it back.
social_hooks.visual_direction: Split screen: frustrated tenant scrolling through ignored texts on one side, a professional demand letter on the other. Text overlay: 'Stop arguing. Start demanding.'
social_hooks.script_notes: Open with screen recording of unanswered messages. Cut to letter being dropped in mailbox. End with bank deposit notification screenshot.
social_hooks.caption: Stop letting your landlord ghost you. 60 seconds. $19.99. No signup. Link in bio. #SecurityDeposit #TenantRights #Renting #LifeHack

social_hooks.hook: What to do when your landlord doesn't return your deposit? Stop texting. Do this instead.
social_hooks.visual_direction: POV shot of tenant hitting send on an informal text, then shaking head. Hard cut to printing a formal demand letter with state law citations.
social_hooks.script_notes: Voiceover: 'Begging doesn't work. State law does.' Show countdown timer: '60 seconds to generate.' Close with CTA card.
social_hooks.caption: They legally can't ignore a certified demand letter. Get yours at Deposits-Back.com #LandlordTips #Renters #Deposit

social_hooks.hook: My landlord said I'd never see my deposit again. Then I sent this letter.
social_hooks.visual_direction: Storytime format. Screenshot of landlord's threatening email vs. the final demand letter. Transition to refund email.
social_hooks.script_notes: Emotional hook in first 3 seconds. 'I thought I lost $1,800...' Reveal the letter template. 'Got it back in 11 days.'
social_hooks.caption: Normal wear and tear isn't a deduction. Know your rights. #MoneyBack #RentingTips #TenantTok

social_hooks.hook: Can a landlord keep your security deposit? Only for these 3 things.
social_hooks.visual_direction: Quick checklist format on screen: '1. Unpaid Rent 2. Damage (not wear & tear) 3. Lease-breaking fees.' Then red X over fake deductions like 'cleaning' and 'repainting.'
social_hooks.script_notes: Fast-paced with trending audio. End with: 'If they deducted something not on this list, they stole from you. Get it back.'
social_hooks.caption: If they're wrongfully withholding, fight back in 60 seconds. $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com #TenantTips #KnowYourRights

social_hooks.hook: I wrote a security deposit dispute letter in 60 seconds without a lawyer.

social_hooks.caption: No signup. No subscription. Just results. Demand your deposit back at Deposits-Back.com #Renting #DepositReturn #SmallClaims

social_hooks.hook: Is your landlord required to return your deposit? Yes—and here's the deadline they missed.
social_hooks.visual_direction: Map of US with state deadlines flashing (14, 21, 30, 45 days). Calendar pages flipping past the due date.
social_hooks.script_notes: Hook with 'If it's been more than 30 days, they already broke the law.' Direct to letter generator for late returns.
